T001.description: Run npm test baseline before changes
T001.result_summary: Baseline confirmed: 19 suites/30 tests pass pre-fix

T002.result_summary: Added optional group_id/groupId capture to payload types + extractInboundMessages

T003.result_summary: Added optional groupId param to buildTextMessagePayload, default undefined

T004.description: New contract test for group-reply outbound shape
T004.result_summary: New contract test written + test-app.ts mock extended with recipientType; confirmed reproduces the bug pre-fix

T005.result_summary: Added group-shaped scenario; confirmed fails pre-fix

T008.result_summary: Added group-shaped scenario; confirmed fails pre-fix

T009.description: Update sendTextMessage to support recipient_type group
T009.result_summary: sendTextMessage now accepts optional recipientType='group', adds recipient_type field to outbound body only when set; 1:1 shape unchanged

T010.description: Route reply to group_id when present in IncomingMessageService.handle
T010.result_summary: Reply now routes to message.groupId with recipientType='group' when present, else falls back to message.from unchanged; full suite green (20/20, 36/36)

T011.description: Run full npm test to confirm all pass
T011.result_summary: Confirmed: 20 suites/36 tests all pass (30 pre-existing unmodified + 6 new group-routing tests)

T012.description: Run npm run lint on changed files
T012.result_summary: eslint on all 10 changed files: 0 warnings/errors. Pre-existing unrelated jest.config.ts parserOptions failure (out of scope) not touched by this feature
